html:
March 2026 — Operations Notes

Spring season is ramping up. Focus on Texas collection launch and wildflower inventory replenishment.

Priority Actions

  • Native Grass Blend 10lb — Critical stock (15 days). Reorder from supplier immediately.
  • Texas Bluebonnet Mix — 21 days remaining. Coordinate with Fishbowl for expedited transfer.
  • Lawn Repair Mix — 34 days. Queue reorder for end of March.

Klaviyo Campaigns

55 campaigns scheduled through May. Texas Collection Launch set for March 22. Ensure Fishbowl stock is confirmed before send.

Google Ads

PMax is pacing well. MER of 7.69 MTD vs budget of 7.5. Shopping bottom-20 products updated — monitor performance through end of March.

Walmart

Active listings at 257. SEO spreadsheet ready for upload. Complete catalog sync before April peak season.
